package.name: m1_hardware
package.description: ros2_control SystemInterface for the M1 robot's Damiao (DM) CAN motors (dual 7-DOF OpenArm arms + shared prismatic lift). MIT-mode SocketCAN driver, forked from OpenArm's openarm_hardware and ported to ROS 2 Jazzy; the Damiao CAN codec (openarm_can, Apache-2.0) is vendored under vendor/. Joint set, CAN ids, motor models and gains are read from the URDF ros2_control parameters (no hardcoded DOF), so an arbitrary joint set including the lift is supported.
